challenges.area: No senior oversight on advertiser output
challenges.impact: The advertiser operates without a clear performance standard or accountability loop — campaigns run but no one is holding results against targets

challenges.area: Coordination bottleneck sits with the owner
challenges.impact: Alessandro spends time managing the advertiser directly, pulling him out of growth work and creating a single point of failure
No consistent pipeline process or follow-up system — deals stall or go cold because there's no one actively pushing them forward
Without weekly data synthesis, decisions are reactive — there's no clear view of what's working, what's not, and where to focus

approach.body:
The core problem is structural: Alessandro is doing both the CEO job and the CMO job simultaneously. Coordinating advertisers, reviewing performance, and managing sales all require different bandwidth — and they're all sitting on one person's plate.

The solution is a part-time CMO layer: a dedicated point of accountability between Alessandro and his advertiser, a structured sales process that moves deals forward without his constant attention, and a weekly reporting system that makes the whole operation legible at a glance.

At 10–15 hours per month, this is designed to give maximum leverage — senior oversight and process, not execution overload.

points.label: Advertiser Coordination
points.description: Weekly check-ins, performance feedback, and brief templates — the advertiser gets clear direction and Alessandro gets his time back

points.label: Sales Process
points.description: Pipeline review, follow-up sequences, and call support — deals move forward without the owner chasing every one manually

points.label: Weekly Reporting Dashboard
points.description: Automated Ads Manager data pull via Claude Code — spend, leads, CPL, ROAS delivered every Monday with clear recommendations

items.benefit: Clear brief, targets reviewed, blockers surfaced before they become problems — 2h/month
Advertiser receives structured, data-backed direction — not just gut feedback — 2h/month
Standardises how work gets briefed, reviewed, and approved — removes ambiguity — 1h/month
Every deal gets a status, a next action, and an owner — nothing sits idle — 1h/month
Deals that go quiet get re-engaged — fewer leads lost to inaction — 2h/month
Alessandro has a senior voice on high-value calls, improving close rate — 1–2h/month

items.activity: Automated data pull from Ads Manager via Claude Code
items.benefit: Raw performance data collected weekly without manual exports — 1h/month

items.activity: Formatted weekly report — spend, leads, CPL, ROAS
items.benefit: Alessandro sees exactly where money is going and what it's producing, every week — 1h/month
Not just data — a clear 'here's what to do about it' for the week ahead — 1h/month
Align on priorities, review what worked, set direction for the month ahead — 1h/month
Ensures the advertiser is working on the right things, not just busy things — 1h/month

investment.roi_framing: One recovered deal or one optimised campaign typically covers the monthly retainer. Senior CMO oversight without the full-time salary.

bonuses.detail: Automated Ads Manager data pull built and handed over — runs weekly without manual input
If after the first month it's not the right fit, we part ways cleanly — no lock-in
Questions and decisions don't wait for the monthly call — respond within 24h on WhatsApp/Slack

next_steps: Confirm — Formal acceptance of this proposal and scope
Payment — First month's retainer to begin
Onboarding — Share access to Ads Manager, CRM/pipeline tool, and reporting platforms
Kick-off call — 60 minutes to align on current state of advertiser, pipeline, and priorities before Day 1

terms.detail: Monthly retainer, billed at the start of each month
Part-time CMO oversight as defined above. Excluded: ad spend (at client's expense), content production, direct platform management, paid tool subscriptions
30-day written notice required to end the engagement
All templates, dashboards, and systems built during the engagement are client property
Ads Manager access and current pipeline/CRM must be shared before Day 1
